code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      tokens = list.push(tokens, parsed)
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  tokens = list.push(tokens, parsed)
end

mut sorted = true
mut idx = 1
let total = tokens.len()
while idx < total
  let prev = match tokens.get(idx - 1)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let cur = match tokens.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if cur < prev
    sorted = false
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
